module.name: dq-command
module.description: DOT Driver Qualification File System — 49 CFR §391.51 (DQF) and §391.53 (DHF)
module.author: True North Data Strategies

concept.description: Manages the full lifecycle of DOT Driver Qualification Files (DQF) and Drug & Alcohol History Files (DHF). Includes driver self-service intake via token-gated forms, document checklist tracking, auto-generation of compliance documents, and a daily sweep that creates suspense items for missing or expiring documents.
concept.regulatoryBasis: 49 CFR Part 391 (Subparts C, D, E, F), 49 CFR Part 382, 49 CFR Part 40
concept.inputMethod: Driver intake form (token-gated), fleet manager uploads, API
concept.outputMethod: Checklist dashboard, generated PDFs, suspense items

files.GET /files: List all DQ files for org with checklist completion %
files.POST /files: Create DQ file record for a driver, generate intake token
files.GET /files/[id]: Get single DQ file with full document checklist
files.GET /files/[id]/checklist: Checklist view — all docs, status, expiry, gaps

documents.PATCH /documents/[id]: Update doc status, expiry, reviewer notes
documents.POST /documents/generate: Generate a document from driver data

intake.GET /intake/[token]: Validate intake token, return form schema
intake.POST /intake/[token]/complete: Mark intake complete, trigger doc generation

compliance.POST /sweep: Daily sweep — flag expiring docs, create suspense items
compliance.GET /gaps: Return all drivers with missing or expiring DQ docs

integrations.paperStack: PDF generation for 7 auto-generated document types
integrations.clerkAuth: Org-scoped tenant isolation + admin role checks
